extDesc.message: A tool to migrate YouTube subscriptions in batches with controlled limits.

step1Desc.message: Generate the list from your old source profile:

step1_li3.message: Scroll down to the bottom to load all subscriptions.

howItWorks.message: How does the Batch Counter work?

howItWorksDesc.message: YouTube may temporarily flag your account if it detects hundreds of automated subscriptions in rapid succession. For your protection, use the controlled batch system:

hw_li1.message: The script runs the amount defined in the Batch Limit and pauses safely.

hw_li2.message: Overall progress is saved. On the next day, simply reactivate the engine to run the next batch.

hw_li3.message: Tip: If you want, you can manually delete already subscribed channels from the text box. When you save the edited list, the counter resets automatically.

noteDesc.message: After saving the list and turning on the green engine button at the top, click the extension icon in Chrome's toolbar to open the first automation in the new account.
